name: Sweetleaves
intro_body: 😃 Welcome to Sweetleaves - your neighborhood cannabis store in the heart of the North Loop, open daily and always here for a good time.

promo_code_title: $10.00 off 2 select products with code BUNDLE26
description:
📍Since 2024, Sweetleaves has been here to make cannabis simple, approachable, and stigma-free. We’ve built a space where Minnesotans can explore the plant freely - for wellness, creativity, or just feeling good.
🛒Shop online, in-store, or order curbside pickup. Delivery coming soon!
🍃Join the Garden Club to earn points! Link on our website.
first_time_announcement: 🛍️ Order via Weedmaps or our website sweetleavesnorthloop .com
